# Resource: test_no_frontmatter

Fixture for FrontmatterRule tests — intentionally has no YAML frontmatter
block at all, so the rule should emit a missing-frontmatter result for each
require_* toggle.

## Argument Reference

* `name` - (Required) Name of the instance.

## Attribute Reference

This resource exports no additional attributes.
